title: Oregon House Committee Holds Hearing On Delaying Clean Trucks Rule
content: The Oregon House Committee on Climate, Energy and Environment held a public hearing on House Bill 3119 on Thursday. The bill is a bipartisan effort to delay Oregon's Advanced Clean Trucks rule, which went into affect Jan. 1. It would declare an emergency and demands the state's Department of Environmental Quality to delay adoption of the regulations until Jan. 1, 2027.
author: Analysts Account
